zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha de Markham於大約1252年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓時，她的父親Robert de Markham23歲，母親Sarah de Snitterton33歲。她與William de Longvilliers結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1305年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾豪頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha de Markham于大约1252年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾馬卡姆 克林頓时，她的父亲Robert de Markham23岁，母亲Sarah de Snitterton33岁。她与William de Longvilliers结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1305年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾豪頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha de Markham was born about 1252, in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Robert de Markham, was 23 and her mother, Sarah de Snitterton, was 33. She married William de Longvilliers. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1305, in Haughton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha de Markham est née environ 1252, à Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Markham, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Snitterton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé William de Longvilliers. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1305, à Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha de Markham um 1252 in Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Markham 23 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Snitterton 33. Sie hat William de Longvilliers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1305 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Haughton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha de Markham è nata il circa 1252 nel Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Markham, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Snitterton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato William de Longvilliers. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1305, nel Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha de Markhamが約1252年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアマークハム クリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Markhamは23歳，母Sarah de Snittertonは33歳であった。William de Longvilliersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1305年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアハウトンで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha de Markham(이)가 대략 1252년 영국 노틴그함실르 마카 클린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Markham(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Snitterton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William de Longvilliers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 하우그h턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha de Markham nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Markham, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Snitterton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Longvilliers. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1305, em Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha de Markham родилась около 1252 г. в местности мархам клинтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Markham было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Snitterton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Longvilliers. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1305 г. в местности хотон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha de Markham nació aproximadamente 1252, en Markham Clinton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Markham, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Sarah de Snitterton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con William de Longvilliers. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1305, en Haughton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años.
